message:
feat(FJ-P2C-007-E): unit + property tests for FFI call interface

Added adversarial tests (oversized buffer, empty registry, mixed dtype
outputs), buffer lifecycle test, marshal roundtrip test, error display
coverage, and 4 property tests (f64/i64 scalar roundtrip, buffer size
consistency, zeroed buffer invariant). 49 tests total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
